log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Gnome — Armored Escapist.
→ Javelin: [d20:5+6=11 vs AC 20] MISS.
--- Gnome — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:20+3=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:1+-2=-1 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15
REASONING: Throwing rock at Gnome — Armored Escapist (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:19+9=28 vs AC 20] HIT! 25 damage. Gnome — Armored Escapist HP: 34/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Gnome — Armored Escapist.
→ Javelin: [d20:16+6=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 16 damage. Gnome — Armored Escapist HP: 18/59
